title: ilex kaushue
intro: Ilex kaushue, also known as the Taiwanese evergreen holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae, native to Taiwan. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Ilex kaushue is known for its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation and improving immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its effectiveness.
